items.title: Optimization for Machine Learning (Bottou, Curtis, Nocedal)
items.author: Léon Bottou, Frank E. Curtis, Jorge Nocedal
items.note: Survey of stochastic gradient methods, batch sizing, and convergence intuition for ML practitioners.

items.title: PyTorch SGD optimizer documentation
items.author: PyTorch Developers
items.note: Reference for the standard SGD implementation used with mini-batch training loops.

items.title: Deep Learning (Goodfellow, Bengio, Courville) — Chapter on optimization
items.author: Ian Goodfellow, Yoshua Bengio, Aaron Courville
items.note: Accessible treatment of mini-batch SGD, challenges of noise, and learning rate in neural network training.
